data.title: 国际服「An Unconcealed Heart」预约活动
data.summary: The Ninjutsu Research Club is calling for backup! And they have a special gift for Sensei as thanks
data.body:
The Ninjutsu Research Club is calling for backup! And they have a special gift for Sensei as thanks for helping them become an official club!

⬇️Pre-Register⬇️
https://nexon.link/5fU
